events.message: Hey! I see you're logged into the archive system. Be careful what you dig up.
events.responseA: Just watch your back. Not everyone here is who they claim to be.
events.responseB: Confidence is good. Overconfidence will get you caught.

events.message: I'm hungry! Where's my dinner? 😾
⚡ MORNING BRIEFING: All servers operational. Security clearance verified. Continue investigation.
Hey, did you remember to empty the dishwasher? It's your turn this week.
events.responseA: Thanks! Appreciate it. Coffee room stays cleaner when we all pitch in.
events.responseB: Really? Check the schedule. You're on for this week. Please handle it.

events.message: Detected unusual login patterns on your account. Running security sweep. Stand by.
🌙 NIGHT SHIFT PROTOCOL ACTIVE. Reduced monitoring. Proceed with caution.
Lunch break. Don't forget to log out of sensitive terminals if you're leaving your desk.
Pro tip: Check the forensics board. You can connect emails, files, and events to build your case. Cross-reference everything.
events.responseA: That's the spirit. Pattern recognition is key to breaking these cases.
events.responseB: Fair enough. Just make sure you're documenting everything properly.

events.message: End of business hours. Any after-hours access will be flagged for review. Keep that in mind.
📊 AUTO-BACKUP INITIATED: Your investigation notes and forensics board are being synchronized to local cache.
Fresh coffee in the break room. Made it strong today. You look like you could use it.
events.responseA: No problem. There's donuts too if you're hungry.
events.responseB: Suit yourself. More for me then! 😄

events.message: 💬 TAPPER MESSAGE CENTER ONLINE. Secure channel established. Staff communications synchronized.
